summary: Every conjunct has a discriminating counterexample test (PENDING left: 1.2, user-advanced: 1.3, no advance op: 1.4/1.5, non-resolve entry: 3.1/3.2), same-call is pinned by a single version bump plus independent store reload, and both derived and explicitly declared advance shapes fire; a disable-auto-advance mutation fails 4 tests.
